nl_statement: Maximum LTV for standard residential mortgages is 95%
source_quote: The maximum loan-to-value ratio for standard residential mortgages is 95%.

nl_statement: Maximum LTV for buy-to-let mortgages is 75%
source_quote: For buy-to-let mortgages, the maximum LTV is 75%.

nl_statement: Private mortgage insurance is required when LTV exceeds 90%
source_quote: Applications where the LTV exceeds 90% require private mortgage insurance (PMI) arranged through an approved provider.

nl_statement: New build properties have a maximum LTV of 85%
source_quote: New build properties are subject to a reduced maximum LTV of 85%.

nl_statement: Maximum LTV for HMOs is 70%
source_quote: For houses in multiple occupation (HMOs), the maximum LTV is 70%.

nl_statement: Maximum loan amount is £2,000,000
source_quote: The maximum loan amount for any single application is £2,000,000.

nl_statement: Loans above £1,000,000 require Senior Underwriter approval
source_quote: Loans above £1,000,000 are classified as high-value and require Senior Underwriter approval.

nl_statement: Minimum gross annual income for single applicant is £25,000
source_quote: The minimum gross annual income for a single applicant is £25,000.

nl_statement: Minimum combined gross annual income for joint application is £30,000
source_quote: For joint applications, the combined minimum gross annual income is £30,000.

nl_statement: Maximum income multiple for single applicants is 4.5x gross annual income
source_quote: The maximum income multiple is 4.5x gross annual income for single applicants.

nl_statement: Maximum income multiple for joint applicants is 3.75x combined gross income
source_quote: For joint applicants, the maximum income multiple is 3.75x combined gross annual income.

nl_statement: Permanent employees must have minimum 6 months with current employer
source_quote: Applicants in permanent employment must have a minimum of 6 months continuous service with their current employer.

nl_statement: Applicants in probationary period are not accepted
source_quote: Applicants still within a probationary period are not accepted.

nl_statement: Self-employed applicants must have minimum 2 years trading history
source_quote: Self-employed applicants, including sole traders and limited company directors, must provide a minimum of 2 years of trading history

nl_statement: Contract workers must have minimum 12 months continuous contracting history
source_quote: Contract workers must demonstrate a minimum of 12 months continuous contracting history in the same sector.

nl_statement: Zero-hours contract workers are not accepted
source_quote: Zero-hours contract workers are not accepted.

nl_statement: Minimum credit score is 620 (Experian)
source_quote: The minimum acceptable credit score is 620 (Experian). Applicants with a credit score below 620 will be declined.

nl_statement: No CCJs accepted within the last 6 years
source_quote: No County Court Judgements (CCJs) are accepted within the last 6 years, regardless of whether they have been satisfied.

nl_statement: No bankruptcy, IVAs, or Debt Relief Orders within the last 6 years
source_quote: No bankruptcy, Individual Voluntary Arrangements (IVAs), or Debt Relief Orders within the last 6 years.

nl_statement: Total unsecured debt must not exceed 15% of gross annual income
source_quote: Total unsecured debt must not exceed 15% of gross annual income at the time of application.

nl_statement: Minimum property value is £75,000
source_quote: The minimum property value is £75,000.

nl_statement: Leasehold properties must have minimum 70 years unexpired lease
source_quote: Leasehold properties must have a minimum unexpired lease term of 70 years at the time of application

nl_statement: Minimum EPC rating is E for residential properties
source_quote: The minimum acceptable EPC rating is E for standard residential properties.

nl_statement: Stress test at SVR + 3% or 7%, whichever is higher
source_quote: the lender's standard variable rate (SVR) plus 3 percentage points, or (b) a floor rate of 7%.

nl_statement: Maximum debt-to-income ratio is 45%
source_quote: The maximum debt-to-income (DTI) ratio is 45%.

nl_statement: Minimum applicant age is 18
source_quote: The minimum age at the time of application is 18.

nl_statement: Maximum age at end of mortgage term is 70 for standard products
source_quote: The maximum age at the end of the mortgage term is 70 for standard products

nl_statement: Maximum 2 applicants per application
source_quote: A maximum of 2 applicants are permitted per application.

nl_statement: Minimum mortgage term is 5 years
source_quote: The minimum mortgage term is 5 years.

nl_statement: Maximum mortgage term is 35 years
source_quote: The maximum mortgage term is 35 years.

nl_statement: Interest-only mortgages have maximum LTV of 50%
source_quote: Interest-only mortgages are available up to a maximum LTV of 50%
